description: Cross-print species mirror between the two wave-enriched Snubbull prints in corpus. DAA-070 (otumami art) and FUS-115 (Kyoko Umemoto art) share verbatim flavor text — the timid-puppy-getting-bullied Pokedex window — across two illustrators and two consecutive Sword & Shield expansions. DAA-070 frames the species in the grumpy-jowled-portrait register; FUS-115 reframes the same species into the cozy-meadow-resting register with a bow accessory. Same species, same canonical Pokedex flavor window, divergent compositional register — the cohort precedent that wave 23 Lunatone and wave 24 Starly cross-print mirrors established. Older pre-enriched prints (LOT-137, SMB-90) are out of scope for this mirror; they attach when enriched.
